children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: Not later than 180 days after , the Federal Director, in coordination with the Commercial Director, shall establish an advisory committee, to be known as the “Green Building Advisory Committee”.December 19, 2007

children.label: A
children.text: each agency referred to in ; andsection 17081(e) of this title

children.label: i
children.text: State and local governmental green building programs;

children.label: ii
children.text: independent green building associations or councils;

children.label: iii
children.text: building experts, including architects, material suppliers, and construction contractors;

children.label: iv
children.text: security advisors focusing on national security needs, natural disasters, and other dire emergency situations;

children.label: vi
children.text: environmental health experts, including those with experience in children’s health.

children.heading: Non-Federal members
children.label: 2 Non-Federal members
children.text: The total number of non-Federal members on the Committee at any time shall not exceed 15.

children.heading: Meetings
children.label: c Meetings
children.text: The Federal Director shall establish a regular schedule of meetings for the Committee.

children.heading: Duties
children.label: d Duties
children.text: The Committee shall provide advice and expertise for use by the Federal Director in carrying out the duties under this part, including such recommendations relating to Federal activities carried out under sections 434 through 436 as are agreed to by a majority of the members of the Committee.1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Exemption from chapter 10 of title 5
children.label: e Exemption from chapter 10 of title 5
children.text: The Committee shall not be subject to .section 1013 of title 5
